belier.intro: Monday, the Moon's day, opens the week with a more sensitive vibration, dear Aries. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of exchanges and quick thought. The Moon enters Scorpio in your zone of intimate depths, an invitation to dive beneath the surface of things.
belier.love: Venus colors your bonds with a more magnetic intensity today. In a relationship, a moment of true intimacy can reveal an emotion you have kept silent until now. If single, you may feel a strong pull toward someone who steps outside your usual criteria.
belier.work: Mars, your ruler, supports your drive, and the Moon in Scorpio invites you to look at the hidden stakes of a project. A discussion around shared finances or pooled resources can move forward if you ask the real questions. You have the chance to turn a shadow zone into a lever for growth.
belier.energy: Your body asks today for a movement that releases gathered tensions. An intense sport or a brisk walk can channel your energy in a constructive way.
belier.intuition: Your intuition wakes up in the sensations you do not always dare to face. A diffuse feeling can carry an essential truth if you grant it time.
belier.mantra: I turn shadow into quiet strength
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: Monday's lunar day lays a particular softness on your hours, dear Taurus. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of resources and nourishes your relationship to value. The Moon enters Scorpio in your zone of partnerships, an invitation to meet the other in their true depth.
taureau.love: Venus, your ruler, supports a denser attention for those who share your life. In a relationship, a conversation led with an open heart can reinforce trust between you. If single, you may feel a strong magnetism toward someone who seems both close and mysterious.
taureau.work: You have the chance to move forward on a duo project where your steadiness makes all the difference. A professional exchange can take a more engaging turn if you accept sincerity as the ground. Avoid retreating into your habits, the other can bring you a precious perspective.
taureau.energy: Your kidneys and throat appreciate good hydration and a moment of full breathing. A gentle back stretch can release tensions that have built up over the past few days.
taureau.intuition: Your intuition flows today through the way others look at you. A word received in a sincere exchange can light up an angle that was still escaping you.
taureau.mantra: I open to the depth of true meeting
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Sun keeps moving through your sign and this Monday of the Moon celebrates your vibrant season, dear Gemini. Mercury, your ruler, supports your sharp wit and your taste for nuanced ideas. The Moon enters Scorpio in your zone of daily life and the body, an invitation to honor what truly supports you.
gemeaux.love: Venus colors your bonds with a more subtle yet touching intensity today. In a relationship, a simple gesture made with presence can matter more than a grand declaration. If single, you have the chance to cross paths with someone in your daily routine, in a place you visit often.
gemeaux.work: You can use this day to bring order to a routine that no longer serves you. Attention given to your organization can free an energy that was missing for you to move ahead. Avoid scattering yourself on too many fronts, choose the angle that really sparks you today.
gemeaux.energy: Your body asks for a calmer rhythm than usual, listen to its subtle signals. Keep a moment of silence away from screens to allow your mind to breathe fully.
gemeaux.intuition: Your intuition wakes up in the small gestures of daily life done with presence. A routine lived differently can bring you a clearer reading than a long analysis.
gemeaux.mantra: I celebrate what carries me each day
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: Monday, the day of the Moon your ruler, finds you particularly receptive and luminous, dear Cancer. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of retreat and invites you to honor this need for inner softness. The Moon enters Scorpio in your creative and romantic zone, a magnetic vibration crosses your day.
cancer.love: Your heart opens today to an intensity that may surprise you with its depth. In a relationship, a shared moment of tender complicity can revive a precious sensuality. If single, you have the chance to notice someone who awakens in you a strong and unexpected emotion.
cancer.work: You can use this day to let a creative project close to your heart unfold freely. An idea born from emotion can become the seed of a larger creation. Avoid judging yourself too quickly, let inspiration take shape at its own rhythm.
cancer.energy: Your stomach and heart appreciate a meal savored with full awareness. A creative activity such as drawing, writing or cooking can nourish your energy subtly.
cancer.intuition: Your intuition shows itself in what makes you vibrate without rational explanation. A pull toward a color, a piece of music or a place can carry a precious message for you.
cancer.mantra: My emotions are the source of my creativity
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: Monday of the Moon brings a welcome softness to your usual rhythm, dear Leo. The Sun, your ruler, in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of friendships and collective projects. The Moon enters Scorpio in your zone of home, an invitation to care for your intimate space with attention.
lion.love: Venus colors your heart with a grounded warmth that spreads through the private sphere. In a relationship, building a cozy cocoon at home can nourish your bond with tender depth. If single, you may feel drawn to someone met in a familiar or close-knit setting.
lion.work: You have the chance to set aside outward ambition to tend to your foundations today. A project tied to your home, your office or your inner balance can take a fine step forward. Avoid chasing the spotlight at all costs, your power also recharges in intimacy.
lion.energy: Your heart appreciates a steady rhythm and simple pleasures that warm you. A quiet moment at home or a calming bath can fully recharge your energy.
lion.intuition: Your intuition speaks to you in the silence of your home and in the memories that gently rise. A dream, an image or a buried emotion can carry a precious truth to welcome.
lion.mantra: My home is the source of my light
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: Monday's lunar day invites you to breathe more widely at the start of the week, dear Virgo. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your professional zone and nourishes your quiet ambitions. The Moon enters Scorpio in your zone of close exchanges, an invitation to speak with more depth and truth.
vierge.love: Venus colors your bonds with a fair and nuanced attention today. In a relationship, a conversation held without masks can reinforce trust between you. If single, you have the chance to cross paths with someone in your neighborhood or close circle, and the exchange can take a surprisingly intense flavor.
vierge.work: You can use this day to put on paper the ideas that have been pressing since the past few days. A writing, presentation or teaching project can take shape today with finesse. Avoid analyzing everything, leave room for the practical intuition that defines you.
vierge.energy: Your belly and intestines appreciate simple food and a real moment of calm digestion. A gentle walk after a meal can harmonize your energy with subtlety.
vierge.intuition: Your intuition wakes up in words spoken or heard with attention. A sentence received by chance can light up a deeper inner questioning.
vierge.mantra: My words carry my truth with care
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: Monday of the Moon lays a precious softness on your hours, dear Libra. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of expansion and nourishes your wish for new horizons. The Moon enters Scorpio in your zone of resources, an invitation to clarify what truly nourishes you over time.
balance.love: Venus, your ruler, colors your bonds with a more grounded and sensual elegance today. In a relationship, a moment of concrete attention can reinforce your shared intimacy. If single, you may feel drawn to someone who offers you a stable and engaging presence.
balance.work: You have the chance to reflect quietly on what truly pays you, both financially and humanly. A project tied to the value of your work can clarify a coming orientation. Avoid making a decision under urgency, let the reflection mature with calm.
balance.energy: Your kidneys and lower back appreciate good hydration and gentle stretches. Favor sensory pleasures that ground you without weighing you down today.
balance.intuition: Your intuition sharpens in your relationship to the tangible and what you touch. A physical sensation, a scent or a texture can bring you useful information to welcome.
balance.mantra: I quietly discern what helps me grow
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: Monday of the Moon finds the Moon in your sign and amplifies your magnetism, dear Scorpio. The Sun in Gemini keeps illuminating your zone of partnerships and nourishes your deep exchanges. Your sensitivity is especially vivid today, welcome it as a strength rather than a fragility.
scorpion.love: Venus colors your bonds with a magnetic intensity that vibrates particularly strongly. In a relationship, your aura touches your partner with great accuracy, and a shared moment can take on an unforgettable flavor. If single, you can attract glances without seeking them, your radiance speaks for you.
scorpion.work: You have the chance to set a lucid eye on your true professional aspirations today. A duo project can take a step forward if you accept to share the reins fairly. Avoid wanting to control everything, your strength today also comes from your capacity to let be.
scorpion.energy: Your energy is powerful yet sensitive, listen to your body's signals with care. A moment in water, bath or swim, can soothe you and gently center your emotions.
scorpion.intuition: Your intuition is especially sharp today and perceives the invisible with clarity. Trust your first feeling, it often carries the most precious truth.
scorpion.mantra: My deep feeling lights my path
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: Monday's lunar day invites you to breathe widely and honor your need for inner calm, dear Sagittarius. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of partnerships and nourishes your dialogue with the other. The Moon enters Scorpio in your zone of inner retreat, an invitation to honor your need for silence.
sagittaire.love: Venus colors your bonds with a tender depth that may surprise you today. In a relationship, a moment of intimacy far from the outside world can reinforce your complicity in an unexpected way. If single, you may feel drawn to someone discreet who touches a secret part of you.
sagittaire.work: You have the chance to step back from your ongoing projects to better perceive their meaning. A reflective pause can bring you a clarity more precious than a rushed new action. Avoid committing to too many horizons at once, choose the one that resonates most deeply.
sagittaire.energy: Your thighs and hips appreciate gentle and free movement, without constraint. A moment of meditation or restorative yoga can harmonize your energy in depth.
sagittaire.intuition: Your intuition reveals itself in the silence and retreat you grant yourself today. A dream, a fleeting image or a deep emotion can carry a precious message.
sagittaire.mantra: Silence opens me to my truest insights
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: Monday of the Moon invites you to keep some flexibility in your starting week, dear Capricorn. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of daily life and nourishes your reflection on your organization. The Moon enters Scorpio in your zone of friendships, an invitation to connect with those who truly resemble you.
capricorne.love: Venus colors your bonds with a tender and playful friendship today. In a relationship, sharing a project or a common vision can reinforce your complicity in a precious way. If single, you have the chance to notice someone in your close circle that you had not seen from this angle.
capricorne.work: You can use this day to exchange with people who share your deep ambitions. A discussion with a friend can light up a professional project that is taking shape within you. Avoid staying alone with your thoughts, the echo of others can move your thinking forward.
capricorne.energy: Your knees and bones appreciate a regular and structured movement. Keep a moment of warm togetherness, your energy also feeds on sincere human connection.
capricorne.intuition: Your intuition wakes up in contact with a group or a trusted friend. A word heard in a friendly exchange can resonate further than you might believe.
capricorne.mantra: My sincere bonds nourish my ambitions
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: Monday's lunar day lights your hours with an inspiring glow turned toward your aspirations, dear Aquarius. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your creative zone and nourishes your taste for what makes you vibrate. The Moon enters Scorpio in your professional zone, an invitation to embody your ambition with depth.
verseau.love: Venus colors your bonds with an intense and magnetic vibration today. In a relationship, a shared project that blends ambition and complicity can reinforce your bond in a new way. If single, you may cross paths with someone in a professional or public context and the resonance can surprise.
verseau.work: You have the chance to reflect calmly on the deeper direction you wish to give your path. A professional project close to your heart can take a clearer shape today. Avoid letting outside pressures distract you, listen to your inner voice.
verseau.energy: Your ankles and nervous system appreciate a calm rhythm and regular pauses. A creative movement such as free dance can release an energy that was looking for an outlet.
verseau.intuition: Your intuition reveals itself in your bond with what surpasses you and pulls you upward. A spontaneous vision of your future can carry a true note to honor.
verseau.mantra: I shape my future with heart and vision
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: Monday of the Moon invites you to open your horizon and let your imagination breathe, dear Pisces. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of home and nourishes your need for a cocoon. The Moon enters Scorpio in your zone of travel and expansion, an invitation to widen your view of life.
poissons.love: Venus colors your bonds with a poetic depth that is particularly touching today. In a relationship, a conversation about your dreams and long-term projects can reinforce your spiritual complicity. If single, you may feel drawn to someone from elsewhere or carrying a different vision.
poissons.work: You have the chance to reflect on a larger project that would help you grow. A training, a professional trip or an expanding encounter can sprout today. Avoid limiting yourself to your usual frame, the horizon is gently calling.
poissons.energy: Your feet and your whole body appreciate fluid movement such as swimming or dancing. A moment of daydream outdoors can fully recharge your subtle energy.
poissons.intuition: Your intuition is especially wide and welcomes the signs of the world with finesse. A book, an encounter or a distant image can carry a message rich in meaning.
poissons.mantra: My horizon grows with the rhythm of my dreams
poissons.author: Sibylle
